column3: Figure 4.4 -- the impulse response whose frequency response

# Impulse response of the BRS flame tran: # The stem plot is vector graphics; sample values are read from the drawing commands
# (no pixel quantization).  dt = 0.25 ms; density_per_s is the plotted h(t) in 1/s and
# coefficient = h(t_j) * dt is the discrete coefficient of F(f) = sum_j coefficient_j
# * exp(-2i pi f t_j).  The identified response is truncated at 17.5 ms; the zero tail
# up to the plotted 20 ms is kept out.
